seo.title: VEED Alternative for Lyric Videos — AI Song-First Workflow, Free
seo.description: Looking for a VEED alternative for lyric videos? LyricsVideo.ai auto-transcribes lyrics from audio, syncs to the beat, generates visuals, and exports free — no timeline editing.

hero.badge: VEED alternative — AI lyric video maker, free
hero.subhead: VEED is a general video editor — great for subtitles and talking heads, but lyric videos still mean manual text placement and timeline work. LyricsVideo.ai starts from the song: upload audio, AI auto-transcribes lyrics, syncs every line to the beat, and generates visuals. Export free, no subscription needed.

trust: Export free, no subscription or credit card

comparisonTable.title: VEED vs LyricsVideo.ai for Lyric Videos
comparisonTable.description: VEED is useful when you need a general editor. LyricsVideo.ai is faster when the job is turning a song into a lyric video.

rows.label: Starting point
values: Upload a song and let AI build the lyric video flow
Open a video editing timeline and assemble text, timing, and visuals

rows.label: Lyrics
values: AI transcribes lyrics from audio automatically
Lyrics usually need to be prepared, pasted, and arranged

rows.label: Music timing
values: Lines sync to the beat with editable review
Timing depends on timeline edits and manual adjustments

rows.label: When VEED is better
values: Use LyricsVideo.ai for song-first lyric videos
Use VEED for talking-head edits, subtitles, and general social videos

comparisonTable.note: The difference is workflow shape: VEED gives you editing tools; LyricsVideo.ai turns the song itself into the project.

howItWorks.title: How This VEED Alternative Makes Lyric Videos

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. Unlike VEED, there's no blank timeline — the song drives the workflow from the start.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. No dragging text boxes, no adjusting timestamps frame by frame. AI also generates visuals matched to the song's mood.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Confirm lyrics are accurate and timing feels right, then export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Make Lyric Videos on LyricsVideo.ai Instead of a Timeline Editor
whyChoose.description: VEED is a capable general editor, but making a lyric video in VEED means typing lyrics, placing text, syncing timestamps, and building on a timeline. LyricsVideo.ai eliminates all of that — upload a song and get a finished lyric video.

highlight.title: Song in, lyric video out — no timeline
highlight.description: VEED gives you a timeline and text tools. LyricsVideo.ai gives you a finished lyric video from a song upload — lyrics transcribed, synced, and visualized automatically.

cards.title: Song-first project setup
cards.description: The upload starts with audio analysis, lyrics, timing, and visuals instead of asking you to assemble a blank timeline.

cards.title: Review instead of reconstruct
cards.description: You review synced lyric lines and visual direction instead of recreating the song section by section with text boxes.

cards.title: Release assets stay aligned
cards.description: Full-song videos and short clips can share the same lyric timing and visual direction, so release content feels consistent.

items.question: Is LyricsVideo.ai free as a VEED alternative?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your lyric video — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: How is LyricsVideo.ai different from VEED for lyric videos?
items.answer: VEED is a general video editor — you type lyrics, place text, and sync timestamps on a timeline. LyricsVideo.ai auto-transcribes lyrics from audio, syncs to the beat, generates visuals, and gives you a finished lyric video. No timeline needed.

items.question: Do I need to type lyrics like in VEED?
items.answer: No. Upload your audio and the AI transcribes every lyric line automatically, in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit if needed.

items.question: Is VEED still better for some projects?
items.answer: Yes — VEED is better for general video editing, talking-head content, subtitled clips, and mixed social content. For lyric videos specifically, LyricsVideo.ai is faster because it's built for that one job.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels and paid releases. Make sure you have rights to the music you upload.
